title: USTR Finalizes Action on China Tariffs Following Statutory Four-Year Review
source: Office of the U.S. Trade Representative
interpretation: The official event is represented by ANAS as a trade_policy, geopolitics, supply_chain, semiconductors exposure with currency pressure around USD, CNH, JPY, SGD. In the 7_day window, FrictionGraph's largest standalone RMSD chain is EUR -> JPY -> SGD -> EUR, while the strongest event-overlap chain is USD -> JPY -> SGD -> USD. These are different chains, which helps separate broad market stress from event-specific currency-chain alignment.
caution: This case links official-event exposure to nearby FrictionGraph chain behavior. It is an explanatory alignment record, not a causal claim or trading signal.
